verdictType: by-looking (multimodal player-POV, NOT a CV threshold)
summary: Hero shows exactly ONE rifle held in both hands, pointing where it fires (muzzle flash at the barrel tip) in aim-right and aim-up; the turret shows ONE gunmetal barrel on a weaponless dome. No phantom waist gun / second baked weapon on either entity. Confirmed on both the local serve and the deployed public URL.

renderPathHashesAtVerdict.note: The hero/turret weapon LOOK only changes if the render code (or its sprite assets) change. run-acceptance.mjs recomputes these and flags the by-looking verdict as POSSIBLY-STALE if they differ — a human must then re-look, so the recorded verdict can never silently mask a render regression.
